Pace v1.0.8

What's new:

- Photo Journal: view, edit and annotate all uploaded photos per challenge in a dedicated scrollable gallery.
- Post-completion notes: after completing a pic challenge, optionally add a text note — stored and displayed in the photo journal and montage.
- Cinematic montage: Ken Burns zoom/pan effect with crossfade transitions for a video-like slideshow feel.
- Redesigned XP toast: centered overlay with activity name, unlock lines, and motivational quote.
- Easter egg celebrations: dialog shown on every egg unlock, meta trophy dialog on all 12 found — fires from home screen and detail screen.
- About screen: app logo, version, and "Made with ❤ by uriel" accessible from Settings.
- Backup improvements: save JSON backup directly to device (file picker) in addition to share sheet. Filenames include date and time.
- Activity calendar now shows current month first with day-of-week headers.
- Montage screen hides nav bar for immersive viewing; default speed 1fps with cycling speed control.
- Photo montage and journal buttons shown whenever photo completions exist, not only when photo requirement is enforced.
- Onboarding tour: animated 5-page introduction shown on first launch — covers activity types, daily check-ins, streaks, XP, and badges. Revisit anytime from Settings → App Tour.
- Activity reminders: tap the bell icon on any activity to schedule multiple daily notification times. Notifications are automatically skipped if the activity is already completed for that day. Each activity manages its own independent reminder schedule.
- Notification icon: status bar now shows the Pace app icon instead of the generic Flutter default.
- Fixed: notification "Mark Done" action no longer bypasses photo requirement on pic challenges.
- Fixed: trophy count no longer exceeds profile total when meta trophy is unlocked.
- Fixed: first easter egg unlock animation now correctly fires when user had zero eggs on screen open.
